mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_summary ( deviceId, roleId, lastMessageTimestamp, summary, promptTokens, completionTokens, createTime) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{roleId}, #{lastMessageTimestamp,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{summary}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT deviceId, roleId, lastMessageTimestamp, summary, promptTokens, completionTokens, createTime FROM sys_summary WHERE sys_summary.deviceId = #{deviceId} AND sys_summary.roleId = #{roleId} ORDER BY sys_summary.createTime DESC LIMIT 1
